description:
During a match on , I observed the player SxTxQ.. clearly using cheats. In the provided video, it is evident that SxTxQ.. was constantly aiming at and shooting enemies through walls, which strongly indicates the use of wallhacks.

Additionally, SxTxQ.. never used a drone to gather information about enemy positions, yet moved precisely and purposefully through the map as if they already had all the information. This behavior clearly demonstrates that they gained unfair advantages by using cheats.

Furthermore, SxTxQ.. has played multiple matches with the players shown in the screenshot. These players should also be marked as "boosted by cheater" since they benefited from the unfair advantages provided by SxTxQ..’s cheating.

Unfair advantage through the use of cheats
Disruption of the gaming experience and fair competition for all participants
Undermining the integrity of the game
Request:

I kindly request that SxTxQ.. be investigated for their cheating behavior and appropriately penalized. Additionally, the players who played with them and are shown in the screenshots should be marked as "boosted by cheater". Appropriate actions, such as temporary suspensions or permanent bans, should be considered to maintain the fairness and integrity of the game.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.
